_comment: Subtitle template — copy this file and fill in your content

_content_guidelines.text_length: 50-150 characters per slide for best TTS and subtitle display
_content_guidelines.structure: intro → core concepts (3-6 slides) → comparison/examples → applications → summary
_content_guidelines.slide_types: Use type: intro for opening, type: outro for closing, omit for regular content
